summary: Iteration 72 - CRM with 8 demo clients testing completed. Backend APIs verified: /api/crm/clients returns 8 clients with $22.28M total AUM, /api/crm/analytics returns comprehensive CRM analytics, /api/crm/clients/{id} returns specific client details. Frontend Client CRM page (/client-crm) correctly displays all 8 clients from backend. Client 360 page (/client-360) working with comprehensive client data. All 18 backend tests passed.

integration_issues.flow: CRM Command Center vs Client CRM data mismatch
integration_issues.issue: CRMCommandCenter.jsx uses hardcoded DEMO_CLIENTS (5 clients, $13.58M AUM) instead of fetching from backend /api/crm/clients (8 clients, $22.28M AUM)
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Both pages work but show different data sources

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - blocks initial view but content loads correctly behind it

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update CRMCommandCenter.jsx to fetch from /api/crm/clients instead of using hardcoded DEMO_CLIENTS to ensure consistency with ClientCRM.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CRM routes (/app/backend/routes/crm.py) correctly implements 8 demo clients with comprehensive data
ClientCRM.jsx correctly fetches from /api/crm/clients and displays all 8 clients
Client 360 View correctly displays Wheeler family demo data
CRM is correctly positioned as first section in Adviser mode navigation (adviserBaseNav array)
Navigation structure: CRM > Command Center, All Clients, Wealth Overview, Tasks & Workflows, New Client
Each client card correctly shows: name, status, stage, total_wealth, annual_income, accounts_count, pending_tasks

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor data source inconsistency in CRM Command Center)

seed_data_creation: None needed - backend has 8 hardcoded demo clients
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified CRM with 8 clients: 1) Backend /api/crm/clients returns 8 clients with summary (total: 8, active: 6, total_aum: $22,280,000), 2) /api/crm/analytics returns comprehensive analytics by status/type/risk, 3) /api/crm/clients/{id} returns specific client with accounts/goals/insurance/tasks, 4) ClientCRM page at /client-crm displays all 8 clients with wealth data, 5) Client 360 at /client-360 shows Wheeler family with $2.85M wealth, 6) CRM is first section in Adviser mode navigation. NOTE: CRMCommandCenter.jsx uses hardcoded demo data (5 clients) while ClientCRM.jsx uses backend data (8 clients).

mocked_apis.CRM_analytics_endpoint: DEMO DATA - derived from 8 demo clients
mocked_apis.CRM_tasks_endpoint: DEMO DATA - 10 tasks hardcoded in backend
mocked_apis.Client_360_View: DEMO DATA - Wheeler family data hardcoded in frontend
